description_long: This pastry shop is a two-story commercial building with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist facade. The exterior is primarily white with salmon-pink trim, including horizontal bands, window frames, and roof edging. The front features two large rectangular windows on the upper floor and a striped awning in white and salmon-pink over the ground-floor entrance, which is a glass door with a metal frame. The roof has two small HVAC units and raised parapet sections at the corners, adding geometric interest. The side and rear walls are plain, with no windows or decorative elements, emphasizing the shop's street-facing orientation. The overall design is clean and functional, with subtle color accents that give it a welcoming, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, two-story pastry shop with a white facade, salmon-pink trim, and a striped awning over the entrance. The building features large front windows and a flat roof with HVAC units.
description_view_0: Front and left side view showing the striped awning, two upper windows, glass entrance door, and roof details.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the awning, entrance, and both front windows, with more of the right side visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain wall with no windows or doors, and the roof's HVAC units.
description_view_3: Right side and rear view, displaying the unadorned side wall and partial awning edge.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with geometric lines, flat roof, and simple color accents
